name: UX/UI Comprehensive - All Sections
description: Comprehensive UX/UI test covering all app sections: Dashboard status, quick actions, Settings financial/vacation config, Payroll, and Logs table

planSteps.description: Open the ShiftPro app and check the Dashboard section is visible by default
Verify Dashboard has a status card showing current status label
Verify Dashboard has a timer card showing today's hours with clock in time and break duration
Verify Dashboard has Quick Action buttons: Sick Leave, Vacation, Overtime, and Remote
Verify Dashboard has a weekly summary section showing hours, shifts, and overtime values
Verify Dashboard has a vacation balance card showing remaining annual and casual leave
Click the Settings navigation button at the bottom of the page
Verify Settings has Work Location card with latitude, longitude, and geofence radius inputs and a Detect Location button
Verify Settings has Shift Thresholds card with three shift start/end time inputs and a Save button
Verify Settings has Preferences card with toggle switches for auto-detect location, notifications, and vibrate on action
Verify Settings has Financial Settings card with base salary input and Save Salary button
Verify Settings has Deductions card with Add Deduction and Save Deductions buttons
Verify Settings has Vacation Settings card with annual leave and casual leave number inputs and Save Vacation button
Click the Logs navigation button at the bottom of the page
Verify Logs section has a Monthly Overview card showing total hours, days worked, and vacation left
Verify Logs section has a Daily History table with column headers: Date, Shift, In, Out, and Total
Click the Payroll navigation button
Verify Payroll has month navigation, summary card, day editor, and allowances editor
Click the Dashboard navigation button to return to home
Verify Dashboard content is fully visible and interactive after navigating back from other sections
